name: Eval-snapshot pre-commit guard cannot accept verified zero-drift prompt changes
description: The pre-commit eval-snapshot guard demands a staged snapshot file whenever a prompt file (apps/api/src/services/**/*-prompts.ts or services/llm/*.ts) is staged. For a prompt change verified to produce ZERO snapshot drift (pnpm eval:llm exit 0, no file changes), this is structurally unsatisfiable - there is nothing to stage - forcing a documented hook bypass. First hit: WI-580 / PR #900 (resolvePromptLearnerName gating; no fixture sets learnerName, so no snapshot could drift). Repo doctrine: repeated bypasses of the same check mean the gate is mis-placed - fix the gate. Proposed: let the guard accept a zero-drift receipt (e.g. the harness writes a hash-stamped receipt file the hook validates) as an alternative to a staged snapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: A prompt-file commit with verified zero snapshot drift passes the pre-commit guard without bypass, via a harness-produced receipt or equivalent mechanical evidence; a prompt change WITH drift still fails unless snapshots are staged; the escape doctrine in AGENTS.md Required Validation stays accurate.
